nasb.text: For the house of Israel and the house of Judah Have dealt very treacherously with Me,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: For the house of Israel and the house of Judah have been utterly treacherous to me, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 以色列家和猶大家， 待我實在太奸詐了。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 以色列人和犹大人根本不忠于我。 这是耶和华说的。
